name: Caitlyn Kiramman
description:
Summary:Caitlyn makes a deep exploration about the serious murder of her mother, questioning all the people who witnessed or were in the assault, she is so desperate that she decides to go to the Piltover prison, she meets a bandit from the suburbs who soon realizes many details that she discarded, such as the disappearance of the mysterious Jinx.

Enjoy it!
creator: MadeSilver_90
